basics.name: Divesh Kumawat
basics.label: Cloud & Full-Stack Developer
basics.summary: Cloud and Full-Stack Developer skilled in AWS, serverless architectures, and modern web technologies. Hands-on experience building and deploying scalable AI-powered applications with a strong focus on performance, accessibility, and production-ready systems.

work.name: EPL Ecosystem
work.summary: Developed and integrated the official EPL cloud package with AWS support for the EPL ecosystem.
highlights: Implemented cloud utilities for AWS S3, Lambda, and SQS integrations
Designed a simplified EPL facade layer with modular boto3 support using eplang[cloud]
Created 25 unit tests with mocked AWS services achieving high test coverage
Collaborated using GitHub workflows: feature branching, pull requests, and code reviews

projects.name: SecureVault
projects.description: Enterprise-grade secure file storage backend built with NestJS and Clean Architecture. Features encrypted file sharing with configurable permissions, time-limited access, device certificate restrictions, and comprehensive audit logging.
highlights: Clean Architecture with NestJS and TypeScript
Encrypted file sharing with granular permission controls
90%+ test coverage with comprehensive integration tests

projects.name: Fun-Facts Generator
projects.description: Fully serverless AI-powered application using AWS Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, Bedrock, and Amplify to generate fun facts. Built scalable backend APIs with IAM-based access control and hosted the frontend on AWS Amplify for a cloud-native experience.
highlights: AI-driven content generation via AWS Bedrock
IAM-based access control and DynamoDB persistence

projects.name: AI-StudyBuddy
projects.description: Full-stack AI-powered learning platform using Angular, Node.js, and Google Gemini API for generating personalized study materials from PDF documents. Features glassmorphism UI, accessibility modes, text-to-speech, and offline export for flashcards and quizzes.
highlights: Personalized AI study material generation from PDF uploads
Glassmorphism UI with accessibility and dark mode
Text-to-speech and offline export for flashcards

projects.name: EPL Cloud Package
projects.description: Open-source contribution to the EPL ecosystem — developed and integrated the official EPL cloud package with AWS support including S3, Lambda, and SQS integrations, a simplified facade layer, and modular boto3 support via eplang[cloud].
highlights: Official cloud package for the EPL programming language
AWS S3, Lambda, and SQS integration modules
25 unit tests with mocked AWS services

projects.name: DevOps Helper
projects.description: AI-driven educational tool that standardizes the explanation of complex DevOps topics through a structured 4-layer learning framework. Helps users learn cloud and DevOps concepts interactively.
highlights: Structured 4-layer learning framework for DevOps concepts
Covers AWS, Docker, CI/CD, and infrastructure topics
